Vikram Chhapwale Projects Articles

My name is Vikram Chhapwale (Vik)

I do software and art

I am currently a senior engineer at CapitalOne in London

Some people might know me better as my online handle: Burgundy



Here is my favourite work

🍞 Breadcrumb: Organise your things from photos to voice clips using a #hashtag

👨‍💻 Creative Routine Generator for helping creatives warm up

🎥 Machine Learning model to predict ENT cancer from HPV for a contest (we won!)


Stuff written about me

📰 University of Nottingham writing about my research to turn bacteria into cryptographic secure passwords
